title: Add Debug footer link to toggle debug panel

requirements.text: In the footer of AppLayout (the area containing '© 2026 APA 9-Ball Scorekeeper. Built with ❤️ using caffeine.ai'), add a small 'Debug' text link next to or below the copyright line. Clicking this link toggles the existing DebugPanel component open and closed. The DebugPanel component already exists at frontend/src/components/debug/DebugPanel.tsx — import and reuse it as-is. The gear icon button must retain its existing Edit Profile behavior completely untouched. No changes to the header, nav buttons, any other layout elements, or any other functionality.

quotes: i want the debug panel as a small link at the bottom. so that it can be removed later once we get this working...and this should not affect any other functionality.
go and do not make other changes

acceptanceCriteria: A small 'Debug' text link appears in the footer area next to or below the copyright line on all pages rendered by AppLayout
Clicking the 'Debug' link toggles the DebugPanel open; clicking it again closes it
The DebugPanel displays results from getOwner(), getCallerPrincipal(), isCallerAdmin(), isCallerApproved(), and getCallerRole() as labeled key-value pairs
The gear icon in the header still opens the Edit Profile modal — its behavior is completely unchanged
The bar chart icon in the header retains its existing behavior unchanged
The Logout button retains its existing behavior unchanged
No other header, nav, layout, or page elements are modified
The 'Debug' link and DebugPanel can be removed later by deleting only the footer link and its associated state — no other code is entangled

constraints: Do not modify the gear icon button or its Edit Profile modal behavior
Do not modify any other header or nav elements
Do not modify the bar chart icon button behavior
Do not modify the Logout button
Reuse the existing DebugPanel component from frontend/src/components/debug/DebugPanel.tsx — do not recreate it
No changes to any page other than adding the footer link toggle in AppLayout
nonGoals: Moving or rewiring the debug panel toggle to any header button
Adding any keyboard shortcut for the debug panel
Any changes to existing page layouts beyond the footer debug link
